title: Spherical Waves — sound + form
description: T662 / T74 cycle 2: structural mirror of sphericalwaves.com. 3D + soundscape interactivity is the headline gap; the Phase-1 mirror reduces the page to its IA + content.

sections.title: Sculpting sound into space
sections.lede: An independent studio crafting spatial audio, 3D environments, and synesthetic experiences for cultural institutions, brands, and music labels.

sections.title: GAP-T662-6 — Three.js / WebGL canvas section variant
body: The original landing is a full-bleed WebGL canvas (Three.js) rendering a generative sphere of particles that respond to the cursor + an FFT of a looping ambient pad. Forge has zero 3D / WebGL section primitives. This is a NEW gap class: not just a missing component but a missing rendering surface. Proposed shape:

Canvas3D { scene_module: String, audio_src: Option<String>, controls: CanvasControls }. The scene_module is the URL of an ES module that exports a default function (scene, audio) => animator. The runtime injects Three.js as a stable known-version peer dep (defense-in-depth: vendored, not CDN-loaded).
Risk: 3D canvas content is heavy — 1.5-3 MB for the typical Three.js+audio bundle. Need a deliberate fallback poster image + lazy bootstrap so non-WebGL clients get the IA without the bytes.

sections.title: GAP-T662-7 — case-study card with audio preview on hover
body: Companion to GAP-T662-2 (hover-video). Same shape but audio: cards swap a static cover for a 4-second muted-by-default loop on hover, with an inline mute/unmute affordance. Cards on this site are smaller (avg 80 KB MP3 vs 2.4 MB MP4) so the budget is easier. Proposed: CmsCard.hover_audio: Option<HoverAudioSpec> { src, loop_seconds, default_muted }. Reuses the T432 dynamic_runtime.

items.value: Listening sessions, mood-board exchange, sonic palette agreement.
Rapid 2-3 minute audio sketches; client picks one direction in week 1.
Final piece produced in our studio; surround + binaural masters by default.
All raw stems + a documented session file. Future remixes are yours, not ours.

sections.title: Reach the studio
body: We take on 6-8 commissions a year. Booking inquiries: studio@sphericalwaves.com
Press, festival programming, and artist-residency requests: please include your timeline + any relevant references.

sections.text: Phase-1 mirror — IA + content only. WebGL + audio sections are catalogued as gaps and queued for the typed Canvas3D primitive.
